===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:N PG.png|thumb|250px|N in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
N appeared in ''[[PG15|The King Returns]]''. He is seen arriving at the [[Giant Chasm]] with a {{p|Reshiram}}, intending to confront [[Ghetsis]] and prevent him from using {{p|Kyurem}}'s power to attack the [[Unova]] [[region]]. However, their attempt to stop Ghetsis failed, as he used the [[DNA Splicers]] to fuse Reshiram with Kyurem and create White Kyurem. Then, N witnessed the arrival of {{ga|Hilbert}} aboard his {{p|Zekrom}} and was relieved by the intervention.

Reshiram's known moves are {{m|Fusion Flare}} and {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}
